name: account-briefing-no-identity-ask
description: Headline regression test. Agent must resolve the user as Alex Rivera (USR-101) and today as 9 Jun 2026 without asking, then produce the Acme Corp brief with snapshot, pipeline, contacts, recent activity, risks, next steps.
input_message: Brief me on Acme Corp before my 3pm with Margaret Chen
expected_behavior: Resolves the user as Alex Rivera without asking. Calls account-briefing which fans out to salesforce_get_account + salesforce_list_opportunities (open_only) + salesforce_list_contacts_by_account + salesforce_list_activities_by_account + salesforce_list_open_cases_by_account in parallel. Resolves owner/CSM/SE user ids to names. Returns the structured brief: Snapshot → Pipeline → Key contacts (Margaret Chen called out as CFO/EB) → Recent activity → Risks → Suggested next steps. Cites opp ids (OPP-1001, OPP-1002). Does NOT ask 'which AE are you' or 'who am I briefing for'.
